Operation 'listRuleflows' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is identical to summary and lacks actionable detail. Enhanced version explains what ruleflows are in domain context, clarifies the return value structure, and helps AI agents understand when to use this operation (e.g., discovering available services).

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all available ruleflows deployed on the Corticon Server. Ruleflows are executable business rule sequences that can be invoked as decision services. Returns a collection of ruleflow metadata including names, versions, and deployment status. Useful for discovering available decision services and their current deployment state.
data.reasoning: Original description is identical to summary and lacks actionable detail. Enhanced version explains what ruleflows are in domain context, clarifies the return value structure, and helps AI agents understand when to use this operation (e.g., discovering available services).

message: Operation 'listRulesheets' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is too generic and identical to summary. Enhanced version provides domain context about what rulesheets are, clarifies return structure, and helps AI agents understand the operation's purpose in the context of rule asset discovery.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all available rulesheets stored on the Corticon Server. Rulesheets are the foundational rule definitions that define business logic and decision criteria. Returns a collection of rulesheet metadata including names, versions, and associated vocabularies. Use this operation to discover available rule assets and their current state.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic and identical to summary. Enhanced version provides domain context about what rulesheets are, clarifies return structure, and helps AI agents understand the operation's purpose in the context of rule asset discovery.

Original description lacks any context or detail. data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all available vocabularies defined on the Corticon Server. Vocabularies define the data entities, attributes, and operators used in rulesheets and ruleflows. Returns a collection of vocabulary metadata including names, versions, and associated entities. Use this operation to discover available data models and their structure.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks any context or detail. Enhanced version explains what vocabularies are in the Corticon domain, clarifies the return value, and helps AI agents understand when this operation is needed (e.g., understanding available data models).

message: Operation 'getServerLogs' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description is too brief and lacks parameter context. Enhanced version explains the operation's purpose, clarifies that parameters enable filtering, describes the log entry structure, and helps AI agents understand when to use this for monitoring and troubleshooting.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves server execution logs for monitoring and troubleshooting decision service invocations. Supports filtering by time range and log level to narrow results. Returns log entries containing timestamps, severity levels, decision service names, execution details, and error messages. Useful for auditing decision service behavior, diagnosing failures, and monitoring server health.
data.reasoning: Original description is too brief and lacks parameter context. Enhanced version explains the operation's purpose, clarifies that parameters enable filtering, describes the log entry structure, and helps AI agents understand when to use this for monitoring and troubleshooting.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves current performance and operational metrics for the Corticon Server. Returns metrics including decision service execution counts, average response times, throughput, error rates, and resource utilization. Use this operation to monitor server health, track decision service performance, and identify bottlenecks or issues requiring attention.

data.current_description: Processes multiple decision requests in a single batch call.
data.description_suggestion: Processes multiple decision requests in a single batch call. Accepts a BatchDecisionRequest containing an array of individual decision requests. Returns a BatchDecisionResponse with results for each request in the same order. Batch processing may improve performance for high-volume decision execution scenarios.

message: Operation 'undeployDecisionService' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable. Current description is a duplicate of the summary with no detail. Enhanced description clarifies the required input, explains the side effect (service becomes unavailable), and provides context for when this operation should be used.

data.description_suggestion: Removes a decision service from the server, making it unavailable for execution. Requires the serviceName path parameter identifying the service to undeploy. After undeployment, the service cannot be invoked until redeployed. This operation is typically used for maintenance, updates, or decommissioning decision services.
data.reasoning: Current description is a duplicate of the summary with no detail. Enhanced description clarifies the required input, explains the side effect (service becomes unavailable), and provides context for when this operation should be used.

message: Operation 'deployDecisionService' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, not_actionable. Current description is a duplicate of the summary with no actionable information. Enhanced description explains what inputs are required, what is returned, the side effect of making the service available, and potential error conditions for better AI agent understanding.

data.description_suggestion: Deploys a decision service to the Corticon server, making it available for execution. Accepts a deployment request containing the service artifact and configuration. Returns deployment status and service endpoint information. After successful deployment, the service can be invoked via the executeDecisionService operation. Deployment may fail if a service with the same name already exists.
data.reasoning: Current description is a duplicate of the summary with no actionable information. Enhanced description explains what inputs are required, what is returned, the side effect of making the service available, and potential error conditions for better AI agent understanding.
